summary: Order creation fails due to inventory mismatch between catalog and warehouse service.
observable_signals: Stock validation error returned from warehouse-service
Mismatch detected between catalog availability and inventory database
Error code INV-409 triggered during order validation

possible_root_causes.cause: Inventory synchronization job did not update latest stock levels
Caching layer returning stale inventory values
Concurrent reservation process locking stock records

recommended_actions: Verify last successful run of inventory synchronization job
Invalidate or refresh cache related to product availability
Check database locks or concurrent reservation conflicts
Confirm consistency between catalog-service and warehouse-service data sources
ticket_summary: INC-1042 | order-service | production | Order creation fails due to inventory mismatch between catalog and warehouse service. Primary hypothesis: Inventory synchronization job did not update latest stock levels.
